calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Andrea Ross appeared by telephone for Steven Rossmore (Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding priority. Ms. Ross spoke of her Clients financial hardship and stated that her Client would be able to conclude the matter sooner than the Public Administrator. The Court granted the petition appointing Steven Rossmore as Administrator of the Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Continued To Feb-02-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
